Everyone must speak in a TV character voice for {rule_turns} rounds. Normal voice = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: TV voices are done. Back to normal.

prompts.text: No saying any TV show titles for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: TV show titles are allowed again.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Showrunner. Everyone must get their approval before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds.
Before drinking, you must say 'Previously on...' and recap your last sip. Lasts {rule_turns} rounds.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more recaps. The show is over.

prompts.text: Everyone must end sentences with 'said no one ever' for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You can end sentences normally again.

prompts.text: No one can say 'show' or 'watch' for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Critic. They rate every answer 1-10 for {rule_turns} rounds. Under 5 = take a sip.
{player1} is Thumbmaster. When they put their thumb on the table, last to notice takes 2 sips. {rule_turns} rounds.
No pointing for {rule_turns} rounds. If you point, take 2 sips.
Everyone must whisper for {rule_turns} rounds. Full volume = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, drink with your non-dominant hand. Wrong hand = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Drink with whatever hand you want.

prompts.text: {player1} picks a word. For {rule_turns} rounds, whoever says that word takes 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1}'s banned word is no longer banned.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, before every answer you must say 'Spoiler alert.' Skip it = 1 sip.
Everyone must do a dramatic gasp before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. No gasp = extra sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, anyone who laughs takes 1 sip. Try to make people laugh.
Everyone must narrate their own actions in third person for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
No one can use the word 'like' for {rule_turns} rounds. Every 'like' = 1 sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, you must cliffhanger every sentence -- leave it unfinished. Complete a thought = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You can finish your sentences now.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, every answer must be delivered as a confessional (look at an imaginary camera). Skip it = 1 sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: Confessionals are over. The cameras are off.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, you must say 'Plot twist!' before making any accusation or pointing. Skip it = 2 sips.
